problemRecovery.title: Recover The Click Removal
problemRecovery.recoveredProblem: The case is not mainly an SEO ranking failure. The load-bearing problem is that answer layers remove the click itself, inverting publishing distribution from rank-to-pageview into citation share and owned audience.
problemRecovery.hiddenConstraint: Ranking can stay intact while the monetizable visit disappears.
problemRecovery.falsifier: If informational rankings recover traffic without citation or owned-audience changes, the distribution-inversion thesis weakens.

candidates.title: Citation Share Market
candidates.summary: Treat answer-engine citations as the new scarce distribution inventory publishers must win.
candidates.mechanism: Measure share of answer citations by topic cluster, then optimize authority, freshness, and proprietary data for answer inclusion.
candidates.claimedDelta: Moves the operating metric from rank position to answer presence and brand recall.

candidates.title: Owned Audience Bridge
candidates.summary: Use the fewer surviving clicks as high-intent bridges into newsletter, app, membership, or event relationships.
candidates.mechanism: Route answer-qualified visitors into owned channels with topic-specific follow-up rather than generic ad pages.
candidates.claimedDelta: Converts lower traffic into a more durable audience asset.

candidates.title: Breaking News Moat
candidates.summary: Shift resources toward surfaces the answer layer cannot flatten: breaking news, Discover, local immediacy, and proprietary reporting.
candidates.mechanism: Classify content by answer-layer flattening risk and reinvest away from evergreen commodity explainers.
candidates.claimedDelta: Stops the organization from trying to repair traffic that the interface removed.

critics.pressure: Strongly grounded because citation share is the direct substitute for answer-layer visibility.
critics.revisionMandate: Define citation measurement by query cluster and answer engine.

critics.pressure: More novel than chasing rankings because it accepts the click has been removed.
critics.revisionMandate: Avoid making citation share sound like old SEO backlinks.

critics.pressure: Mechanism cleanly links answer inclusion to downstream brand and owned-audience gains.
critics.revisionMandate: Specify how proprietary data improves answer inclusion.

critics.pressure: Surviving clicks are high-intent, so owned conversion is plausible.
critics.revisionMandate: Separate the bridge for evergreen, breaking, and analysis content.

critics.pressure: Owned audience is known, but the answer-qualified visitor frame is useful.
critics.revisionMandate: Show how this differs from a generic newsletter CTA.

critics.pressure: Mechanism is solid but downstream of citation share.
critics.revisionMandate: Tie every owned-audience capture to a citation surface.

critics.pressure: Breaking news and freshness are real exceptions to answer flattening.
critics.revisionMandate: Quantify which content formats remain click-worthy.

critics.pressure: Useful portfolio shift but less surprising than citation-share accounting.
critics.revisionMandate: Add a sharper constraint for when to abandon evergreen.

critics.pressure: Mechanism works for newsroom allocation but not the whole revenue model.
critics.revisionMandate: Fuse with owned-audience conversion or citation measurement.
